title: Building the App Store for Agentic Engineering
summary: Cole Medin is building a workflow marketplace for Archon, described as an app store for agentic engineering. The marketplace enables one-click installation and sharing of YAML-based AI coding workflows that run in isolated git worktrees with any model provider, allowing workflows to be battle-tested and shared across users rather than rebuilt privately.
